description: You are logged into Rocket.Chat as the admin user at http://localhost:3000. Your goal is to enable and configure the Omnichannel LiveChat feature for customer support. Enable the Omnichannel/LiveChat feature and register the existing user 'agent.user' as a LiveChat agent. Create an active department named 'Technical Support' with the description 'Front-line technical support department' and assign 'agent.user' to it.
